name: specter-skills
description: Claude Skills + MCP server for Specter — the game backend platform. `npx specter-skills init` installs the skills; `specter-mcp` runs the MCP server.

scripts.generate: node scripts/generate-references.mjs && node scripts/generate-admin-references.mjs && node scripts/generate-client-references.mjs && node scripts/generate-manual-references.mjs && node scripts/generate-curated-references.mjs
scripts.test: node --check mcp/src/index.mjs && node --check mcp/src/specter-client.mjs && node --check mcp/src/auth.mjs && npm run lint:secrets

author: Dirtcube Interactive
